---
title: "Contact Information"
---

📧 **Email:** [aktheexplorer\@gmail.com](mailto:aktheexplorer@gmail.com)

📞 **Phone:** +1 647-625-0780

🔗 **LinkedIn:** [View Profile](https://www.linkedin.com/in/alexandros-karagiannis-340739263/)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

👉 [Download CV](Alexandros_Karagiannis_CV.pdf)

Feel free to reach out for collaboration, research opportunities, or any questions regarding my work.
